description: Schema for commerce-mandate parity vectors. Seven envelope-accepted deterministic JSON observation payloads covering all seven event_kind values (one per kind). Per the parity-corpus convention, all vectors assert envelope-level canonical agreement and set expected.accepted=true; semantic-rejection cases for forbidden top-level payment-data keys, opaque-ref grammar violations, finality-synthesis blocks, missing required fields, scheme_id grammar, and invalid event_kind live in the schema validator tests at packages/schema/__tests__/extensions/commerce-mandate.test.ts.
